source_pr.title: ddl: speed up tests
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Speed up testing time.

### What is changed and how it works?

- TestDropColumn tests `drop column`, so I will add the required columns when I create the table.

- Change multiple insert statements to one.

```
go test  -v -vet=off -timeout 10m  -race -count 1
```
Before this PR:
```
Local
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl    78.583s

CI
2m 23s(https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/11707/pipeline/75/) 
```
After this PR:
```
Local
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl    67.245s

CI
1m 38s(https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/11811/pipeline/75)
```

symptoms: PR focuses on speeding up DDL tests (fewer statements/less setup time), but the case data does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature.
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: No concrete intermittent failure signature provided; PR is about speeding up tests.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch primarily speeds up DDL tests (e.g., creating required columns up-front and consolidating inserts) and does not present a targeted stabilization change tied to a known intermittent failure signature. Without clear evidence of a schema-propagation race or other flaky signature, keep this case as needs-more-evidence instead of guessing the taxonomy.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
analysis:

Changed files (4): ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go, ddl/failtest/fail_db_test.go, ddl/db_integration_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/12888.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=ddl/db_integration_test.go name=db_integration_test
